original_text: American Express Company operates through three distinct business segments: Global Consumer Services Group, Global Commercial Services, and Global Merchant and Network Services. The company provides charge and credit payment card products, travel-related services, merchant acquisition and processing, servicing and settlement, point-of-sale marketing, and fraud prevention services worldwide. American Express serves consumers, small businesses, mid-sized companies, and large corporations through multiple distribution channels including mobile and online applications, third-party vendors, direct mail, telephone, and in-house sales teams. The company employs approximately 75,100 full-time employees and is led by CEO Stephen Joseph Squeri, with headquarters in New York, New York.
revised_text: American Express Company operates through three distinct business segments: Global Consumer Services Group, Global Commercial Services, and Global Merchant and Network Services. The company provides charge and credit payment card products and travel-related services worldwide. Its products and services include payment and financing products, network services, accounts payable expense management products and services, and travel and lifestyle services. The company employs 75,100 full-time employees and is led by CEO Stephen Joseph Squeri, with headquarters in the United States.
changes_summary: Removed the unsupported sentence regarding customer segments and distribution channels as the evidence did not verify these details (Issue 1). Updated the list of products and services to strictly reflect the offerings described in C002, removing unsupported items like fraud prevention and merchant acquisition specifics. Changed the headquarters location from 'New York, New York' to 'United States' to align with the country-level data available in C001 (Issue 2). Retained verified information on business segments, employee count, and CEO.
